name: Network Graph
description: Sophisticated network graph with glowing nodes on dark canvas, showing connections and hierarchies.
template:
Create a sophisticated network graph visualization showing {prompt}

Style requirements:
- Dark charcoal canvas background
- Glowing node colors: teal, amber, coral, pale blue, white
- Fine connecting lines with clean labels
- Balanced, readable, intentionally designed layout
- Clean hierarchy with accurate node-label placement
- Anti-overlap spacing with subtle depth
- Crisp typography for polished technical visualization

Density control:
- 20-50 nodes with clear hub-and-spoke structure
- Larger nodes for major hubs, smaller for peripheral
- Edge labels used sparingly
- Include legend and stats card (nodes, edges, density)
